EmailTemplate.description: Attempt to contact customer regarding lack of payment has failed and confirmation that the debt has been written off.
EmailTemplate.name: Expired Policy (Write Off)
EmailTemplate.subject: Outstanding Payment Update
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We have attempting to contact you in relation to an outstanding balance for your insurance policy, and unfortunately haven’t been able to get in touch with you.
On this occasion and given the circumstances, please note that a decision has now been made to write off the balance, and there is no longer an amount outstanding.
If you have any questions then please do not hesitate to get in touch. We hope you will consider Kingsbridge for your business insurance in the future.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
